creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The immediate issue with pidgin was the missing gstreamer-plugins-v4l2 port. 
Other issues look to be 100% gstreamer-related, and not with pidgin.  Please 
open a PR under GNOME.  However, as I said in my follow-up email, it would be 
good to gather some data points of FreeBSD -> FreeBSD video calls to see 
if the problem is with the different Linux/FreeBSD plugins.
